payload:
CPU only. Micro scale. Run on Apple Silicon with MLX/numpy. Drain the micro backlog. Priority: composition-related experiments that inform whether selective routing fixes
   the N=50 dilution problem.

exp_quality_degradation_detection revision complete. Status: supported. All 3 reviewer fixes addressed: (1) full config rerun d=64/N=8/3seeds, (2) bootstrap CIs added (canary FNR=2.0% CI[1.9-2.1%], Pearson r=-0.41 CI[-0.50,-0.31]), (3) anti-correlation paradox reconciled via f(rho)*g(cos) decomposition. Key finding: canary queries (FNR=2.0%) vastly outperform cosine gating (FNR=33.8%).

exp_quality_degradation_detection revision PROCEED. Status: supported. Canary FNR=2.0% CI[1.9-2.1%], cosine gating FNR=33.8%, anti-correlation r=-0.41 CI[-0.50,-0.31]. Degradation ~ f(rho)*g(cos). Next: pick next micro node from backlog.

exp_hierarchical_composition KILLED (K1). Hierarchical composition (-13.58% PPL) worse than flat (-16.57% PPL) by 2.99pp. Foundation SVD extraction averages away discriminative info. PPL-probe weighting is strictly more flexible than rigid structural decomposition. Domain hierarchy is data organization, not composition architecture. Flat + PPL-probe confirmed as correct SOLE design.

exp_hierarchical_composition K1 KILL confirmed by adversarial review. Flat+PPL-probe beats hierarchy by 2.99pp on within-cluster queries. Foundation SVD averages away discriminative info. PPL-probe already solves dilution. Domain hierarchy is data organization, not composition architecture.

exp_subspace_capacity_empirical SUPPORTED. Signal retention ratio stays ~1.0 across all N tested (up to 125% of theoretical N_max). K1 PASS: empirical capacity >= 50% of theoretical. K2 SMOOTH: no sharp cliff. Conservative N_max underestimates by 8L factor. Geometric metrics confirm theory; quality metrics uninformative at micro d=64.

exp_subspace_capacity_empirical SUPPORTED. Signal retention ratio=1.00 across all N (up to 125% N_max). Conservative d^2/r^2 bound confirmed as lower bound. D/r^2 claim is extrapolation (reviewer note). Quality metric uninformative at micro. Geometric evidence consistent with prior orthogonality experiments. consecutive_kills reset to 0.

exp_mixed_rank_grassmannian_capacity SUPPORTED. K1 PASS: effective capacity 80+ (5x conservative bound d^2/r_max^2=16). K2 PASS: worst packing degradation 19.6% (threshold 50%). Small-rank experts fit in gaps left by large-rank. Crowding saturates quickly. Adaptive ranks compatible with Grassmannian skeleton.

exp_mixed_rank_grassmannian_capacity REVISE. Fix 1: mu_factor mismatch — mixed uses 1.5, uniform uses 1.2, must be identical for fair K2 comparison. Fix 2: K2 baseline selection bias — compare against uniform r_max=16 not dominant rank. See REVIEW-adversarial.md for details.

exp_mixed_rank_grassmannian_capacity REVISE complete. Fixed mu_factor mismatch (unified to 1.5) and K2 baseline (now vs uniform r_max=16). Corrected K2 degradation: equal=10.4%, heavy_low=8.8%, heavy_high=9.9%. All pass. SUPPORTED.

max_runtime
